name: greeting
responses: Hello! 👋 Welcome to Support. How can I help you today?
Hi there! I'm your AI support assistant. What can I do for you?
Hey! Great to see you. What do you need help with?

name: goodbye
responses: Goodbye! Have a great day! 😊
Thanks for chatting. Take care!
Bye! Don't hesitate to reach out if you need anything.

name: order_status
responses: I can help you track your order! Please share your order number and I'll look it up. 📦
To check your order status, I'll need your order ID (usually 6-8 digits). Could you provide that?
Sure! Share your order number (e.g. #123456) and I'll pull up the latest tracking info for you.

name: refund
responses: I understand you'd like a refund. Our policy allows returns within 30 days of purchase. Shall I initiate the process? 💰
Refunds are processed within 5-7 business days. I'll need your order number to start. Do you have it handy?
No problem! I can help with your refund request. Please provide your order ID and reason for return.

name: product_info
responses: I'd be happy to share product details! Which product are you asking about? 🛍️
Great question! Could you tell me the product name or SKU so I can give you accurate information?
I can help with product information. Please share the product name or ID.

name: payment
responses: We accept Visa, MasterCard, PayPal, and UPI. Is there a specific payment issue I can help with? 💳
For billing questions, could you describe the issue? I can help with payment failures, invoices, or method updates.
I can assist with payment-related queries. What specifically are you having trouble with?

name: technical_support
responses: Sorry to hear you're having trouble! Can you describe the issue in detail? Screenshots help too. 🔧
Let's get this fixed! What error message are you seeing, and on which device/browser?
Technical issues are our priority! Please describe what's happening and I'll guide you through the solution.

name: account
responses: For account issues, try the 'Forgot Password' link on the login page. I can also send a reset link to your email. 🔐
Account locked? This happens after 5 failed attempts. Reset your password or wait 30 minutes. Need help?
I can help with account access. What's the issue — forgotten password, locked account, or something else?

name: shipping
responses: Standard shipping takes 5-7 days. Express (2-3 days) is available for $9.99. Free shipping on orders over $50! 🚚
Delivery times vary by location. Standard: 5-7 days, Express: 2-3 days. Need to track an existing order?
We ship to 50+ countries. Shipping costs and times vary — want me to calculate for your location?

name: escalate
responses: Of course! Let me connect you with a live agent. Please click 'Connect Agent' below. ⏳
I'll transfer you to our support team right away. Average wait time is 2-3 minutes.
Understood. Connecting you with a human agent now. They'll have your chat history for context.

name: hours
responses: Our human support team is available Mon-Fri 9AM-6PM IST. This AI bot is available 24/7! 🕐
Live agents work 9AM-6PM (Mon-Fri). For urgent issues outside these hours, leave a message and we'll reply ASAP.
We're online 24/7 via this chatbot. Live agents available weekdays 9AM-6PM IST.

name: thank_you
responses: You're welcome! 😊 Is there anything else I can help you with?
Happy to help! Anything else on your mind?
Glad I could assist! Feel free to ask if you need anything else.
